rates.__EMPTY: Vehicle Age <10 Years, 2.5% additional PO over and above Grid
Renewals : 1.5% additional PO over and above grid
1. All vehicle ages would be counted towards volume slab computation, payout of volume grid shall be restricted to vehicle age < 10 years.
2. South Zone RTO would be counted towards volume slab computation only , volume grid payout is not applicable for South Zone RTO business.
3. For parteners wherever VLI is applicable, SB business shall be excluded wherever SB volucme grid is opted for.
* Terms & Conditions for School Bus Volume Grid
Any SB deals - buses can be regiseterd as fleet ( size >50 ). Registration numbers of the same will have to be provided whilst seeking the deal.
Any deals registered as fleet, volume shall be Considered for volume slab qualification, however no volume slab shall be applicable on deals cases.
For partner wise devivation in grid, evaluation to be done centrally basis volume and profitability.
Any enablers or grid is provided to channel partner should be the highest grid they operate in the market
If any partner is found operationg a higher grid or if there is a maket dissonance, we shall withdraw the enabler with immediate effect.
This enabler and grid shall override all other enablers / grids / Contest / VLI unless Comminicated Otherwise
PO of volume shall be made quaterly,
Guidelines for Hygiene & Impact on PO
1.Policy premium dissonances viz; non- receipt of premium due to chq dishonour of other mode of payment beyond 7 days, 2.5% PO shall be recovered.
2.Policy premium dissonances viz; non- receipt of premium due to chq dishonour of other mode of payment beyond 15 days, 4 % PO shall be recovered.
3. For any discrepancy in risk attributes viz; RTO code GVW bandling, Seating Capacity, Make Model, Fuel Type , CC Banding, Product category, insured name etc. full commision shall be recoverable.
4.CPA is mandatoryfor all policies,Else 1% PO shall be deducted from the overall PO.
Volume will be considered for all makes and ages
Payout will be on Premium for Tata + Maruti Make (Below 2 T)only
Payout not applicable for cross market booking
Any specific delas taken on LCV, Contest shall not be applicable
